artPrompt: A skeletal coin-operated turnstile gate rises in the center of a cold beige corridor, a faintly glowing cyan toll-arm barring passage, a single blank receipt slip curling from a slot below. The mechanism feels endless, a tollbooth into nowhere. Landscape composition, washes bleeding ivory to teal, oppressive arcane hush surrounding empty space. Rendered as loose ink-and-watercolor — confident brush linework, bleeding translucent washes, a limited palette, generous negative space.
name: Standard Processing Fee
text: Spells your opponents cast cost {1} more to cast. There is also a fee for paying the fee, but that fee is currently waived, pending a review of the fee.
flavorText: Itemized: convenience fee, inconvenience fee, and a fee for itemizing.
